title: The Two Crabs
content:
"So awkward, so shambling a gait!"
    Mrs Crab did her daughter berate,
    Who rejoined, "It is true
    I am backward; but you
    Needed lessons in walking quite late."

    Look At Home
meaning:
Walter Crane's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Two Crabs"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
